store_headline: WooCommerce Music Store for Vinyl, Merch, and Downloads
store_subheadline: Sell vinyl, merchandise, and digital downloads from a purpose-built music storefront
features: Music store-optimized WooCommerce design for physical and digital sales
Advanced playlist manager with custom audio players
Portfolio showcase for featured releases and collections
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation for music content
Pop-up displays for album releases and promotional offers
Elementor page builder with music store-specific elements
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
Variation swatches for music formats (vinyl, CD, digital)
Contact forms for customer service and artist inquiries
Mobile-optimized responsive design for music shopping
One-click demo import with complete music store setups
selling_points: Purpose-built for music retail — a store designed from the ground up for vinyl, merch, and digital downloads
Supports physical format variations (vinyl, CDs, cassettes) alongside digital downloads in one unified catalog
Wolf Playlist Manager enables audio previews inside product listings — fans hear before they buy
Direct-to-fan sales architecture removes the intermediary and keeps the margin where it belongs
Music-specific product presentation puts album art, format, and tracklist front and center
Promotional popup system built in for album release campaigns and limited drops
Elementor-powered storefront means layout changes happen in minutes, not hours
key_benefits: Sell vinyl, merch, and digital downloads from a music-native storefront
Convert browsers into buyers with in-store audio previews before checkout
Launch direct-to-fan release campaigns with popup announcements and featured placements
Manage physical and digital format variants: color vinyl, signed editions, WAV downloads
Build a music store that communicates artist identity, not generic e-commerce
Retain full margin by owning your storefront, not splitting revenue with platforms
design_features: Featured release and new arrival showcases
Audio preview integration with product listings
Music video galleries with custom thumbnails
Multiple header styles optimized for music retail

testimonials.text: I love this theme, mainly for its design and functionality. Customer service is good, too!
testimonials.author: rosekirkham
